name: xterm package migration

issues.title: Tech debt: Migrate desktop app from legacy 'xterm' package to '@xterm/xterm' namespace

note: Carried the xterm.js namespace migration deferred from v0.5.4. The deferral root cause turned out to be a Win11 kernel-level reparse-point trust mitigation (not Defender), unblocked by running `pnpm install` from an elevated PowerShell. See CLAUDE.md.
